title.en: Are there any creatures in Ryuzawa?

content.en:
It is true that Long Ze is a Jedi, and no supreme person dares to enter, unless it is the top supreme person of the level of the Void Source Ancestor.

But that kind of supreme person doesn't care about Longze, and he won't go to Longze.

Ye Tian is now invincible, once he enters Longze, he will be annihilated by Longze's special power, but if he is copied into a creature in Longze, and enters Longze with Longze creatures, he will not be annihilated by Longze.

Are there any creatures in Ryuzawa?

Before, Ye Tian really didn't know, but he had been inquiring about Long Ze's situation over the years, so he knew more and more about Long Ze, Long Ze did have a life, called Long Weasel, this kind of life is not very strong, the only point is that it is very fast.

There are strong people who capture the dragon weasel and use it as their own mount, so as to rush in the source sea.

Of course, because the weasel lives in the dragon, it is difficult to catch it, and there are only a handful of dragons that have been caught so far.

But Ye Tian still inquired about the whereabouts of a dragon ferret, and that dragon ferret was not strong, it was only the strength of a second-class invincible, and it was the mount of a first-class invincible, but that first-class invincible had a top supreme behind him as a backer.

Ye Tian didn't snatch the dragon ferret, he just approached the dragon ferret and copied its body.

......

Dust Realm.

This is also an eternal heaven and earth, but it is older than the Heavenly Lin Realm.

There are many more supreme beings in the dust world than in the Tianlin realm, the Tianlin realm is not very famous in the source sea, but the dust world is different, this eternal heaven and earth are very famous in the source sea.

Ye Tian came to the Dust Realm, and approached the Molong Mountain in the Dust Realm very low-key, and the dragon weasel was here.

This dragon weasel belonged to the second-class invincible Chen He, and Chen He was a member of Molong Mountain.

Ye Tian couldn't enter Molong Mountain, and it was difficult for his copying talent to extend to probe the situation inside Molong Mountain, so he could only keep waiting.

Time passed slowly, and finally after a long wait.

Ye Tian finally waited for Chen He to appear, and the other party was riding a dragon weasel and was about to leave, and this scene was captured by Ye Tian.

The moment the copying talent detected the dragon ferret, Ye Tian could copy the dragon ferret's body.

As a result, Ye Tian disintegrated this replica body.

Not long after, Ye Tian recondensed the copy body, but this time it was the body of the dragon ferret.

After copying the body of the dragon ferret, Ye Tian personally took the body of the dragon ferret to Longze, otherwise if the dragon ferret flew over by himself, wouldn't it be very embarrassing if he was caught by the supreme in the source sea?

Ye Tian used the Void Source Hall to quickly move to an area close to Long Ze, and then flew outside Long Ze.

At this time, his dragon weasel body instantly entered the dragon ze.

Ye Tian's body returned to the Void Source Hall and controlled his dragon weasel body wholeheartedly.

Long Ze.

As soon as the dragon ferret's body entered here, it felt the warmth of home, and it was not suppressed at all.

"When Jin Zu threw his corpse and the Eternal Soul Wood from that position just now, according to that speed and strength, plus Long Ze's resistance, it should be in that area!"

Ye Tian flew to that area and began to search for Jin Zu's body.

Along the way, Ye Tian also found some good things, which are estimated to be the remnants of the invincible or supreme who broke into this place before, but they can resist the power of Long Ze and have not been destroyed, which shows that these things are not low.

Ye Tian is really poor now, so he put all these things away.

Soon, Ye Tian arrived in that area, during which he sensed a terrifying aura from the depths of Long Ze, far beyond his current strength, but the owner of that powerful aura did not attack Ye Tian, obviously treating him as an ordinary dragon ferret in Long Ze.

The area of Long Ze was too large, so Ye Tian searched for tens of thousands of years before finally finding Jin Zu's body.

I have to say that Jin Zu's strength is very strong, even if he has fallen for endless years, his body is still not damaged.

However, because Jin Zu's strength was too strong, it was difficult for Ye Tian to take Jin Zu's body.

Fortunately, Jin Zu's treasure was not stored in the inner world, and he did not have an inner world, but placed it in a void treasure, and this void treasure was inside Jin Zu's finger, which was known through Jin Zu's memory.

It took Ye Tian a long time to extend his power to that void treasure and initially refine it before he successfully took it out and then took it away.

After that, Ye Tian left towards Long Zewai, and he didn't encounter any danger along the way.

And Ye Tian's body was already waiting outside Long Ze, and as soon as the dragon ferret's body came out, Ye Tian immediately took the void treasure on the dragon ferret's body, and then immediately returned to the Void Source Palace.

As for the dragon ferret body, Ye Tian naturally collapsed on its own as soon as possible.

--------------

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian began to refine this Void Treasure again, that is, the Void Ball.

The Void Ball is a very common storage treasure in the Source Sea, and its area is very large, comparable to a realm.

After refining the Void Ball, Ye Tian began to probe the situation inside.

I have to say that Jin Zu is indeed rich, there are enough six eternal source objects in this void ball alone, as well as some rare treasures such as void source crystals, and there are also some rare treasures that can refine Ye Tian's body.

Of course, the Eternal Soul Wood that Ye Tian wanted the most was also among them.

"The Eternal Soul Wood is here!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to refine all the rare treasures in the Golden Ancestor Void Ball that could improve his body, and used them to improve his strength.

Then, he began to absorb the origin power of refining the Eternal Soul Wood.

Airplanes!!!!

The origin power of the Eternal Soul Wood was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian's soul, and the speed of this refining was much faster than Ye Jinpeng, because Ye Tian's strength was strong, and his understanding of fit far surpassed Ye Jinpeng.

Of course, Ye Tian was not impacting the Supreme Realm, so he would not absorb too much of the Eternal Soul Wood Origin Power, otherwise it would cause a qualitative change in the soul leap that could not be reversed, and the gains would outweigh the losses.

As the origin power of the Eternal Soul Wood was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian little by little, Ye Tian's soul strength became stronger and stronger.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian felt that he had almost reached the limit, and he could not continue to absorb the origin of refining the Eternal Soul Wood, so he gave up.

After stabilizing the strength of his soul, Ye Tian's strength increased a lot, and then he went to break through the third layer of the Void Tower, but he still failed, but he was very close to success.

"It seems that the second Origin Fit is still needed to absorb the second Eternal Origin Essence!"

Ye Tian muttered.
